rollback_plan: git checkout prod/18thFeb && docker compose up --build
top_constraint: ZERO REGRESSIONS — all existing task CRUD, voice-to-task, kanban, timeline, dashboard, cross-entity linking must work identically. New features are additive only.
codebase_note: MONOLITHIC architecture. Backend: all code in backend/app/main.py (~9,873 lines). Frontend: all views in frontend/src/App.jsx (~8,438 lines). Tasks UI in frontend/src/components/Tasks/TasksView.jsx (1,365 lines). NO separate routes/, models/, pages/, stores/ directories.

tars.role: backend — models + endpoints in main.py, service layer, migrations, tests

codex.role: frontend — new Task components, TasksView.jsx upgrade, App.jsx cross-tab integration

cursor.role: UI/UX — mockup refinement, design QA, component spec. First collaboration.

state_machine.notes: No skipping steps. review -> in_progress means reviewer sent it back.

tasks.title: Review and refine UI mockup templates
tasks.description: Open mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html in browser. Review all 5 sections. Refine spacing, colors, interactions. Add loading skeletons, empty states, error states. Verify consistency with existing TasksView.jsx patterns (gray-900 buttons, gray-50/100 bg, rounded-lg, text-sm). This is Cursor's first task — read PLAN_Tasks-Subtask.md first for full context.
definition_of_done: All 5 mockup sections reviewed and refined
Loading skeleton states added for subtask expansion and widget load
Empty states added (no subtasks, no micro-tasks, no comments, no linked tasks)
Error states added (failed to load, failed to save)
Interactive states verified (expand/collapse, toggle, tab switch)

tasks.title: Database migration + ORM models
tasks.description: Create backend/migrations/phase9_micro_tasks.sql with: (1) CREATE TABLE micro_tasks per PLAN section 3a, (2) ALTER TABLE task_comments ADD COLUMN micro_task_id per section 3b, (3) all indexes. Apply to local dev DB (port 5440). Then add MicroTask class to backend/app/main.py after TaskActivity (line ~586). Add micro_task_id FK to TaskComment model. Verify py_compile passes.
definition_of_done: Migration applied to local dev DB successfully
MicroTask model in main.py after line ~586
SELECT * FROM micro_tasks returns empty result (table exists)

tasks.title: Micro-task CRUD API endpoints
tasks.description: Add 7 micro-task endpoints to backend/app/main.py per PLAN section 4a: POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/micro-tasks (create), GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/micro-tasks (list), PUT /api/micro-tasks/{id} (update/toggle), DELETE /api/micro-tasks/{id}, POST /api/micro-tasks/{id}/comments, GET /api/micro-tasks/{id}/comments, PUT /api/micro-tasks/reorder. Validation: task_id must be a subtask (has parent_task_id). Access control: reuse _check_task_access pattern from line ~9328. Add activity logging via task_service.
definition_of_done: Validation: 400 if task_id is not a subtask
Access control: same as parent task

tasks.title: Enhanced task detail response + comment aggregation + cross-tab endpoints
tasks.description: Three changes in backend/app/main.py: (1) Enhance GET /api/tasks/{task_id} to include micro_tasks array in each subtask object, with micro_task_progress {total, completed} and comment_count per subtask and micro-task. (2) Add scope=all param to GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/comments — returns all comments from task + subtasks + micro-tasks, each tagged with context {type, title, parent_subtask_title}. (3) Add 4 cross-tab endpoints: GET /api/customers/{id}/tasks, GET /api/projects/{id}/tasks, GET /api/inventory/{id}/tasks, GET /api/transactions/{id}/tasks — query tasks by linked_*_id FK, return with subtask/micro-task counts.
definition_of_done: Task detail response includes micro_tasks array per subtask
scope=all returns aggregated comments with context tags
4 cross-tab endpoints return linked tasks with counts
All tested with curl (create task → subtask → micro-tasks → comments → query cross-tab)

tasks.title: Backend tests for micro-task CRUD and aggregation
tasks.description: Create backend/tests/test_micro_tasks.py with tests covering: micro-task creation (happy + validation errors), toggle complete, delete, comments on micro-tasks, comment aggregation (scope=all), cross-tab entity endpoints, task detail with micro-tasks. Reuse existing conftest.py test patterns (if exists) or create minimal test setup.
definition_of_done: Covers: micro-task CRUD, comment aggregation, cross-tab endpoints
No regression in existing task tests (if any)

tasks.title: SubtaskCard, MicroTaskList, and AddSubtaskForm components
tasks.description: Create new React components in frontend/src/components/Tasks/: SubtaskCard.jsx (expandable card — collapsed shows title/assignee/due/priority/progress, expanded shows micro-tasks + comments), MicroTaskList.jsx + MicroTaskItem.jsx (checklist with toggle/assignee/due), AddSubtaskForm.jsx (full form replacing current text input — sends title, description, assignee_id, priority, due_date via FormData to POST /api/tasks/{id}/subtasks), SubtaskComments.jsx (comment thread reusing existing comment UI pattern). Reference mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html sections 1, 2, 4, 5.
definition_of_done: SubtaskCard: expand/collapse with chevron, header with assignee/due/priority/progress
MicroTaskItem: shows title, optional assignee chip, optional due date, comment count
AddSubtaskForm: sends all FormData fields to existing endpoint
SubtaskComments: POST /api/tasks/{id}/comments and GET with existing pattern

tasks.title: Integrate into TaskDetailModal + comment scope toggle
tasks.description: Modify frontend/src/components/Tasks/TasksView.jsx: Replace the checkbox-only subtask section (lines ~951-986) with SubtaskCard components. Each subtask renders as an expandable card. Add comment scope toggle to the Comments tab — [This task] shows task_id comments only, [All comments] calls GET /api/tasks/{id}/comments?scope=all and shows with context tags. Preserve ALL existing TaskDetailModal functionality (status changes, delegation, activity tab, etc).
definition_of_done: Subtask expansion shows micro-tasks and comments
Comment scope toggle works (This task / All comments)
All comments view shows context tags
ALL existing TaskDetailModal features preserved (status, delegation, activity)

tasks.title: EntityTaskWidget and App.jsx cross-tab integration
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/components/Tasks/EntityTaskWidget.jsx — compact widget showing linked tasks for an entity (per mockup section 3). Props: entityType ('customer'|'project'|'transaction'|'inventory'), entityId. Fetches from GET /api/{entityType}/{entityId}/tasks. Shows task cards with status/assignee/due/subtask-progress. Includes quick-add form (POST /api/tasks with linked_{type}_id). Then integrate into frontend/src/App.jsx — add EntityTaskWidget into: customer detail section, transaction detail modal, project detail section, inventory detail section. Task sync: after any mutation, re-fetch tasks in widget.
definition_of_done: EntityTaskWidget renders linked tasks with compact cards
Quick-add form creates tasks linked to entity
Widget in customer detail section of App.jsx
Widget in transaction detail of App.jsx
Widget in project detail of App.jsx
Widget in inventory detail of App.jsx

tasks.title: Design QA — review implemented UI against mockups
tasks.description: Cursor reviews the final implemented UI (tasks 6-8) against mockup templates. Compare: visual consistency (colors, spacing, typography), interaction patterns (expand/collapse, toggle, tab switch), empty/loading/error states. Report deviations as review_notes on tasks 6, 7, 8.

tasks.title: End-to-end testing and deployment to DigitalOcean
tasks.description: Full E2E test locally: create task, add subtask with full fields, add micro-tasks with assignees/deadlines, add comments at all 3 levels, verify All Comments aggregation, verify cross-tab widget on customer/project/transaction/inventory pages, verify existing kanban/timeline/dashboard still work. Then: merge to prod branch, run migration on DO server (postgresql://sitara:sitara_secure_2024@localhost:5435/sitara_crm), rebuild containers, verify all endpoints on production.
definition_of_done: Scenario 1 from PLAN section 12 tested E2E (sales follow-up)
Existing task features: create, kanban drag, timeline, voice-to-task, delegation all work
Migration applied to DO production DB

messages.body:
Task/Subtask enhancement — KICKOFF.

IMPORTANT: This codebase is MONOLITHIC. All backend code is in backend/app/main.py (9,873 lines). All frontend views are in App.jsx (8,438 lines). Tasks UI is in frontend/src/components/Tasks/TasksView.jsx (1,365 lines). There are NO separate routes/, models/, pages/, stores/ directories. Read PLAN_Tasks-Subtask.md for full architecture.

PHASE A (PARALLEL):
- TARS: Tasks 2-5 (schema + models + endpoints + tests) — starting now
- Cursor: Task 1 (mockup review) — start now, no backend dependency

PHASE B (after A):
- Codex: Tasks 6-8 (components + integration + cross-tab) — blocked on tasks 1 + 4

PHASE C:
- Cursor: Task 9 (design QA)
- TARS: Task 10 (E2E + deploy)

Cursor: Open mockups/task-detail-enhanced.html in browser. Sections 1-5 show all new UI. Your job: refine visuals, add missing states, ensure consistency with existing Orbit patterns.

Codex: Wait for tasks 1 + 4 to complete before starting. Your entry point is TasksView.jsx for the detail modal upgrade, and App.jsx for cross-tab widget integration.

Branch: wip/Tasks-Subtask. Rollback: git checkout prod/18thFeb.
